name: MeshVertexNormalList
summary: Provides access to the Vertex Normals of a Mesh.

methods.name: Add(Vector3d)
methods.summary: Adds a new vertex normal at the end of the list.

params.name: normal
params.doc: new vertex normal.

returns.doc: The index of the newly added vertex normal.

methods.name: Add(Vector3f)
methods.summary: Adds a new vertex normal at the end of the list.

params.name: normal
params.doc: new vertex normal.

returns.doc: The index of the newly added vertex normal.

methods.name: Add(Double, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public int Add(double x, double y, double z)
methods.summary: Adds a new vertex normal at the end of the list.

params.name: x
params.doc: X component of new vertex normal.

params.name: y
params.doc: Y component of new vertex normal.

params.name: z
params.doc: Z component of new vertex normal.

returns.doc: The index of the newly added vertex normal.

methods.name: Add(Single, Single, Single)
methods.signature: public int Add(float x, float y, float z)
methods.summary: Adds a new vertex normal at the end of the list.

params.name: x
params.doc: X component of new vertex normal.

params.name: y
params.doc: Y component of new vertex normal.

params.name: z
params.doc: Z component of new vertex normal.

returns.doc: The index of the newly added vertex normal.

methods.name: AddRange
methods.summary: Appends a collection of normal vectors.

params.name: normals
params.doc: Normals to append.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Clears the vertex normal collection on the mesh.

methods.name: ComputeNormals
methods.summary: Computes the vertex normals based on the physical shape of the mesh.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Destroy
methods.summary: Releases all memory allocated to store vertex normals. The list capacity will be 0 after this call. Subsequent calls can add new items.

methods.name: Flip
methods.summary: Reverses direction of all vertex normals This is the same as Mesh.Flip(true, false, false)

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Gets an enumerator that yields all normals (vectors) in this collection.

methods.name: SetNormal(Int32, Vector3d)
methods.signature: public bool SetNormal(int index, Vector3d normal)
methods.summary: Sets or adds a vertex normal to the list. If [index] is less than [Count], the existing vertex normal at [index] will be modified.If [index] equals [Count], a new vertex normal is appended to the end of the list.If [index] is larger than [Count], the function will return false.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of vertex normal to set.

params.name: normal
params.doc: The new normal at the index.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetNormal(Int32, Vector3f)
methods.signature: public bool SetNormal(int index, Vector3f normal)
methods.summary: Sets or adds a vertex normal to the list. If [index] is less than [Count], the existing vertex normal at [index] will be modified.If [index] equals [Count], a new vertex normal is appended to the end of the vertex list.If [index] is larger than [Count], the function will return false.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of vertex normal to set.

params.name: normal
params.doc: The new normal at the index.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetNormal(Int32, Double, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public bool SetNormal(int index, double x, double y, double z)
methods.summary: Sets or adds a vertex normal to the list. If [index] is less than [Count], the existing vertex normal at [index] will be modified.If [index] equals [Count], a new vertex normal is appended to the end of the list.If [index] is larger than [Count], the function will return false.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of vertex normal to set.

params.name: x
params.doc: X component of vertex normal.

params.name: y
params.doc: Y component of vertex normal.

params.name: z
params.doc: Z component of vertex normal.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetNormal(Int32, Single, Single, Single)
methods.signature: public bool SetNormal(int index, float x, float y, float z)
methods.summary: Sets or adds a normal to the list. If [index] is less than [Count], the existing vertex normal at [index] will be modified.If [index] equals [Count], a new vertex normal is appended to the end of the list.If [index] is larger than [Count], the function will return false.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of vertex normal to set.

params.name: x
params.doc: X component of vertex normal.

params.name: y
params.doc: Y component of vertex normal.

params.name: z
params.doc: Z component of vertex normal.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetNormals
methods.summary: Sets all normal vectors in one go. This method destroys the current normal array if it exists.

params.name: normals
params.doc: Normals for the entire mesh.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: ToFloatArray
methods.summary: Copies all vertex normals to a linear array of float in x,y,z order

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

properties.name: Capacity
properties.summary: Gets or sets the amount of vertex normals that the list can hold without resizing.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets or sets the number of mesh vertex normals.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Gets or sets the vertex at the given index. The index must be valid or an IndexOutOfRangeException will be thrown.
